summary: Iteration 16 - Complete Testing of EchoEvents Report and Waste Sheet features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All panels load correctly, form submission works, GL integration verified.
critical_code_review_comments: EchoEvents Report API correctly separates definite vs pending events based on stage (DEFINITE_STAGES vs PENDING_STAGES)
Waste Sheet GL integration working - creates debit (5400 Waste Expense) and credit (1200 Inventory) journal entries on waste creation
Waste Sheet credits properly reduce net_cost and post recovery GL entries
Panel registry correctly registers 'echo-events-report' and 'waste-sheet' panels at lines 626-627
Sidebar.tsx properly imports Settings and Trash2 from lucide-react (no duplicate Cloud import)
Frontend panels use data-testid attributes for testing (waste-sheet-panel, add-waste-btn, submit-waste-btn, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All panels load, form works, GL posting verified)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed waste entries during testing for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified all new features: 1) EchoEvents Report API returns definite/pending events with BEO numbers, revenue, spend, margin - 8 total events (5 definite, 3 pending), 2) Waste Sheet CRUD with GL integration - entries auto-post to gl_journal_entries collection, 3) Waste Sheet credits reduce net_cost and post recovery GL entries, 4) Frontend panels load correctly via panel-registry.ts, 5) Sidebar displays all modules without errors. Test data created with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.

backend_tests.health_endpoint: PASS - Returns healthy status, version 3.1, 10 engines active
backend_tests.echo_events_report: PASS - Returns definite (5) and pending (3) events with BEO numbers, revenue, spend, margin
backend_tests.echo_events_summary: PASS - Returns stage breakdown with counts, revenue, guests per stage
backend_tests.waste_sheet_entries: PASS - Returns waste entries with GL status and journal entries
backend_tests.waste_sheet_create: PASS - Creates entry and auto-posts debit/credit GL entries
backend_tests.waste_sheet_create_no_cost: PASS - Creates entry without GL posting when cost is zero
backend_tests.waste_sheet_credits: PASS - Applies credit, reduces net_cost, posts recovery GL entry
backend_tests.waste_sheet_dashboard: PASS - Returns summary with by_reason and by_department breakdowns
backend_tests.gl_integration: PASS - Verifies debit (5400) and credit (1200) GL entries created

frontend_tests.sidebar_loads: PASS - No 'Error loading' text found, all sections visible
frontend_tests.waste_sheet_panel: PASS - Panel loads with EchoAuruim Integrated badge, dashboard cards, entries table
frontend_tests.waste_sheet_form: PASS - Record Waste form opens, accepts input, submits successfully
frontend_tests.waste_sheet_gl_status: PASS - New entries show 'Posted' GL status in table
frontend_tests.events_report_panel: PASS - Panel loads with Definite/Pending tabs, summary cards, events table
frontend_tests.events_report_data: PASS - Shows BEO numbers, revenue ($144,200), spend ($48,200), margin (66.6%)
